message:
chore: add ephemeral file patterns to .gitignore

Add missing patterns for common agent/runtime artifacts that should never
be committed: storage.sqlite3, rustc-ice-*.txt, a.out, perf.data,
target-codex*/, target_*/, --graph-format.svg.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -60,6 +60,9 @@ crates/ftui-extras/src/seq_*.py
 __pycache__/
 *.pyc
 
+# Compiler crash reports
+rustc-ice-*.txt
+
 # Beads history snapshots (JSONL export is tracked, history is local)
 .beads/.br_history/
